name: Harper
title: Harper
mainAbility: Condense, amplify, and project mana power onto objects

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Hammer Attack
basic.description: After riding her hammer to charge the enemy, Harper spins once to attack.

core.name: Hammer Dash!
core.description: After dashing a short distance, Harper strikes down with her hammer. Inflicts [Airborne] and [Paralyze] (interrupts target for 3 seconds) on hit.

skill.name: Hammer Drift!
skill.description: Harper draws a circle while riding her hammer and charges to attack. Knocks Down on first hit; inflicts [Airborne] on final hit.

skill.name: The Tenderizer!
skill.description: Harper strikes down her hammer rapidly while the Skill button is held. Inflicts [Airborne] and [Porkchopped] (increases Ultimate Skill damage taken from Dark hunters by 1%, stacks up to 12 times, 20 seconds) on each hit.

support.name: Harper's Thunder
support.description: Harper jumps towards the enemy with all her might, attacks as swift as a bolt of lightning, and finally strikes down with her hammer. Inflicts [Airborne] and [Paralyze] (3 seconds) on hit.

qte.name: Hammer Rush
qte.description: Harper jumps towards the enemy with all her might and strikes down with her hammer. Inflicts [Airborne] on hit.

ultimate.name: Harper's Mjölnr
ultimate.description: Harper jumps into the air and throws her hammer powerfully to attack. Knocks Down on first hit; inflicts [Airborne] on final hit.

passive.name: Super Magic Booster
passive.description: [Super Magic Booster] is activated at the start of battle: when the user uses Hammer Drift! it increases their Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage by 5% (stacks up to 4 times, infinite duration). When the user uses Hammer Drift! it activates [London Drift]: increases damage dealt by 20% for 10 seconds.

advancements: A [Shield] equal to 50% of the user's HP is granted while using The Tenderizer!. The max number of hits for The Tenderizer! increases by 4 and the skill damage increases by 160%.

When using Hammer Drift!, the user instantly attacks enemies within 5m range. [London Drift] is enhanced (60% damage increase for 15 seconds). Harper's Mjölnr changes to Harper & Charlotte's Mjölnr. The user's Ultimate Skill damage increases by 70%.
All team members' Defense and HP increase by 8%.

[Porkchopped] is enhanced (2% stacking up to 32 times, 30 seconds). [Super Magic Booster] becomes [Twin Super Magic Booster] (Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage +6%, stacks up to 7 times, infinite duration).
